case.title: PENNSYLVANIA COAL & COKE CO. v. CASSATT

opinion.h4: PENNSYLVANIA COAL & COKE CO. v. CASSATT, (1907)
opinion.h2: PENNSYLVANIA COAL & COKE COMPANY, Petitioner, v. A. J. CASSATT, John B. Thayer, charles E. Pugh, et al. No. 284.
opinion.h4: Supreme Court of the United States Argued October 28, 29, 1907
opinion.p: Messrs. John W. Griggs, Benjamin S. Harmon, david L. Krebs, and George S. Graham for petitioner.
Messrs. John G. Johnson and Francis I. Gowen for respondents.
For the reasons given in the preceding case the judgment is reversed, and the cause remanded with a direction to dismiss the writ of error.[ Pennsylvania Coal & Coke Co v. Cassatt (1907) ]
